subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose right hand lie the reins of all creation and in Whose grasp rest the destinies of all contingent beings! I beseech Thee by Thy Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من فی یمینک زمام الکائنات و فی قبضتک ازمه الممکنات اسئلک باسمک
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
